text: customer asking for a refund on an annual plan they bought 22 days ago — the old policy doc says 15 days so i told them no. they escalated. help?
That doc is stale — we changed it in May. Refund window is 30 days, no exceptions. The Confluence refund policy page still says 15 days, I keep meaning to fix it.
ooh ok good, so this customer is actually within window. approving the refund now
yep. 30 days from charge date, applies to monthly AND annual plans. the 15-day number is dead, if you see it in any doc flag it to me
confirming from the account side — legal signed off on 30 days in the May policy review. it's in the updated terms too
should i just edit the Confluence page myself?
yes please, and drop a note in here when it's done so everyone knows
